metadata.name: Live Stream a Game to a Mobile App

description: A team wants to live stream their game directly to their official mobile app.

nodes.task_description: Set up a new live stream event in the digital content platform.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates the event and gets a unique stream key.

nodes.task_description: Configure the streaming encoder with the correct stream key and settings.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ensures the on-site production team has the correct configuration.

nodes.task_description: Start the stream and monitor its health and quality.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent starts the stream and confirms it is playing correctly in the mobile app.
